description: 建立 Modular Lesson Runtime 的 Detailed Error Logging / 錯誤細節追蹤，收集並顯示練習節點的最小錯誤摘要。

tasks.desc: Expand PracticeEffortMetrics model with error fields.
Update ModularSession.reportEffort and state management for errors.
Integrate error reporting in Practice Renderers (Typing, Scramble, Speaking, P1, P2).
Update ModularLessonResult aggregation and UlvLessonSummaryView UI.
Verify with tests (unit/widget) and manual check.
